channel.title: Dark Theme for Discourse on community.frontity.org
channel.description:
Hi Frontity team,
Would you consider to install a dark theme for discourse on the community.frontity.org? :slight_smile:
In the last 2-3 months spend a bit time on the community reading, exploring and learning frontity and noticed that this is something i'm personally missing on the community. :D
In case you are interested to, here i found a case on how to do it...
https://meta.discourse.org/t/how-do-i-install-a-theme-or-theme-component/63682
https://meta.discourse.org/t/allow-users-to-select-dark-light-theme/60857
Thank you very much. All the best, Dejan

item.title: Dark Theme for Discourse on community.frontity.org
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @dejangeorgiev

Thanks for the suggestion and for the “how-to” links. I personally also favour dark themes. We’ll look into the feasibility of implementing this.

Read full topic
item.source: Dark Theme for Discourse on community.frontity.org

item.title: Dark Theme for Discourse on community.frontity.org
item.dc:creator: dejangeorgiev
item.description:
Hi Frontity team,

Would you consider to install a dark theme for discourse on the community.frontity.org?

In the last 2-3 months spend a bit time on the community reading, exploring and learning frontity and noticed that this is something i’m personally missing on the community.

In case you are interested to, here i found a case on how to do it…

Discourse Meta – 31 May 17

How do I install a Theme or Theme Component?

Importing new themes and theme components To import new themes and components, visit www.yoursite.com/admin/customize/themes or via the UI head to Admin > Customize > Themes Then click on Install here you’ll see this You can install...

Reading time: 5 mins 🕑 Likes: 65 ❤

Discourse Meta – 12 Apr 17

Allow users to select dark / light theme

You can allow your users to select any themes. In this little post I will explain how to create a “dark” theme and “light” theme and then allow users to select between them. Create a Dark color scheme Head to...

Reading time: 3 mins 🕑 Likes: 91 ❤

Thank you very much.
All the best,
Dejan

Read full topic
item.source: Dark Theme for Discourse on community.frontity.org
